content: Which one of the following is an example of genetic diversity?

options.content: Greater variation of ecosystems found in India than in Scandinavia.
Higher diversity of amphibians in the Western Ghats than in the Eastern Ghats.
Variation in potency and concentration of reserpine produced by Rauwolfia vomitoria.
The greater diversity of plant species found in India compared to Central Asia.

explanation: Genetic diversity refers to the variation in the genetic composition within a species. This variation can manifest as differences in specific traits among individuals or populations. For instance, the variation in the potency and concentration of reserpine produced by different populations or individuals of the plant Rauwolfia vomitoria is an example of genetic diversity. This is because these differences in traits are a result of underlying genetic variation within the species.
